meaning: 1. span; 2. horizontal distance between vertical supports
sentence: 这座桥的跨度超过一百米。
pinyin: Zhè zuò qiáo de kuādù chāoguò yī bǎi mǐ.
english: The span of this bridge exceeds one hundred meters.

meaning: 1. to loiter (i.e. reluctant to leave); 2. to linger on
sentence: 她在花园里流连，不肯离去。
pinyin: Tā zài huāyuán lǐ liúlián, bù kěn lí qù.
english: She lingered in the garden, reluctant to leave.

meaning: 1. military banner; 2. flag signal; 3. (fig.) banner (i.e. false prete
sentence: 他打着慈善的旗号骗取捐款。
pinyin: Tā dǎ zhe císhàn de qíhào piànqǔ juānkuǎn.
english: He used the pretext of charity to swindle donations.

sentence: 公司报销了他的交通费。
pinyin: Gōngsī bàoxiāo le tā de jiāotōng fèi.
english: The company reimbursed his transport costs.

sentence: 这家咖啡馆的饮品种类很多。
pinyin: Zhè jiā kāfēiguǎn de yǐnpǐn zhǒnglèi hěn duō.
english: This café has a wide variety of beverages.

sentence: 他被诊断出代谢综合症。
pinyin: Tā bèi zhěnduàn chū dàixiè zōnghézhèng.
english: He was diagnosed with metabolic syndrome.

meaning: 1. forms for reporting statistics; 2. report forms
sentence: 财务部每月都要提交一份报表。
pinyin: Cáiwù bù měi yuè dōu yào tíjiāo yī fèn bàobiǎo.
english: The finance department must submit a report form every month.

sentence: 公司的愿景是为所有人服务。
pinyin: Gōngsī de yuànjǐng shì wèi suǒyǒu rén fúwù.
english: The company's vision is to serve everyone.

sentence: 野战军在边境完成了演习任务。
pinyin: Yězhànjūn zài biānjìng wánchéng le yǎnxí rènwù.
english: The field army completed its exercise mission at the border.

meaning: 1. step by step; 2. little by little
sentence: 公司销售额节节上升。
pinyin: Gōngsī xiāoshòu é jiéjié shàngshēng.
english: The company's sales figures have been rising step by step.

sentence: 这台变压器已经用了十年了。
pinyin: Zhè tái biànyāqì yǐjīng yòng le shí nián le.
english: This transformer has been in use for ten years.

meaning: 1. endangered (species); 2. in imminent danger; 3. critically ill
sentence: 大熊猫曾经是濒危动物。
pinyin: Dàxióngmāo céngjīng shì bīnwēi dòngwù.
english: Giant pandas were once endangered animals.

sentence: 图书馆里有一本世界地图集。
pinyin: Túshūguǎn lǐ yǒu yī běn shìjiè dìtújí.
english: There is a world atlas in the library.

meaning: 1. to rise; 2. to originate; 3. source; 4. derivation
sentence: 黄河发源于青藏高原的巴颜喀拉山。
pinyin: Huáng Hé fāyuán yú Qīng-Zàng Gāoyuán de Bāyánkǎlā Shān.
english: The Yellow River originates from the Bayan Har Mountains on the Qinghai-Tibet Plateau.

sentence: 科学家发现了病毒的新变种。
pinyin: Kēxuéjiā fāxiàn le bìngdú de xīn biànzhǒng.
english: Scientists discovered a new variant of the virus.

meaning: 1. ethanol C2H5OH; 2. same as alcohol 酒精
sentence: 消毒液的主要成分是乙醇。
pinyin: Xiāodú yè de zhǔyào chéngfèn shì yǐchún.
english: The main ingredient in disinfectant is ethanol.

sentence: 工厂的生产越来越专业化。
pinyin: Gōngchǎng de shēngchǎn yuèláiyuè zhuānyèhuà.
english: The factory's production is becoming increasingly specialized.

sentence: 记者在报道中引述了专家的话。
pinyin: Jìzhě zài bàodào zhōng yǐnshù le zhuānjiā de huà.
english: The journalist quoted the expert's words in the report.

sentence: 这道菜的做法很有新意。
pinyin: Zhè dào cài de zuòfǎ hěn yǒu xīnyì.
english: The way this dish is made is very creative.

meaning: 1. the bridegroom's side; 2. of the bridegroom's family
sentence: 婚礼费用由男方家庭承担。
pinyin: Hūnlǐ fèiyòng yóu nánfāng jiātíng chéngdān.
english: The wedding expenses are covered by the groom's family.

meaning: 1. to value; 2. to appraise; 3. to be valued at; 4. estimate; 5. valua
sentence: 专家对这幅画进行了估价。
pinyin: Zhuānjiā duì zhè fú huà jìnxíng le gūjià.
english: An expert appraised the value of this painting.

meaning: four oceans; everywhere on the world (the seven seas)
sentence: 他为人豪爽，四海皆兄弟。
pinyin: Tā wéirén háoshuǎng, sìhǎi jiē xiōngdì.
english: He is generous and treats everyone in the world as brothers.

sentence: 公司实行岗位责任制，每人职责清晰。
pinyin: Gōngsī shíxíng gǎngwèi zérènzhì, měi rén zhízé qīngxī.
english: The company uses a job responsibility system, with each person's duties clearly defined.

meaning: (TCM) the right kidney; (TCM) acupuncture point GV-4, midway between t
sentence: 中医认为命门是人体阳气的根本。
pinyin: Zhōngyī rènwéi mìngmén shì réntǐ yánggì de gēnběn.
english: Traditional Chinese medicine considers the mingmen acupoint to be the root of the body's yang energy.

meaning: to chase a dream; to pursue one's dreams
sentence: 他辞掉工作去追梦，开了一家小书店。
pinyin: Tā cídiào gōngzuò qù zhuīmèng, kāi le yī jiā xiǎo shūdiàn.
english: He quit his job to chase his dream and opened a small bookstore.

meaning: to undergo a transformation; to morph; to turn into; transformed versi
sentence: 她剪了个短发，整个人像是变身了。
pinyin: Tā jiǎn le gè duǎnfà, zhěnge rén xiàng shì biànshēn le.
english: She got a short haircut and it's like she transformed into a completely different person.

sentence: 她是一名在读博士生，专攻材料科学。
pinyin: Tā shì yī míng zàidú bóshìshēng, zhuāngōng cáiliào kēxué.
english: She is a PhD student specializing in materials science.

meaning: to fly solo; (fig.) (of a band member) to go solo; (of an employee) to
sentence: 他从乐队单飞后发行了自己的专辑。
pinyin: Tā cóng yuèduì dānfēi hòu fāxíng le zìjǐ de zhuānjí.
english: After going solo from the band, he released his own album.

sentence: 会议一开始，老板就给整个项目定调了。
pinyin: Huìyì yī kāishǐ, lǎobǎn jiù gěi zhěnggè xiàngmù dìngdiào le.
english: As soon as the meeting started, the boss set the tone for the entire project.

sentence: 小孩子都说湖里有水怪，其实是大鱼。
pinyin: Xiǎo háizi dōu shuō hú lǐ yǒu shuǐguài, qíshí shì dà yú.
english: The kids all said there was a water monster in the lake, but it was just a big fish.

meaning: to create music for a movie or stage production; to dub music onto a s
sentence: 这部电影的配乐让人听了非常感动。
pinyin: Zhè bù diànyǐng de pèiyuè ràng rén tīng le fēicháng gǎndòng.
english: The film's soundtrack is deeply moving to listen to.

meaning: all-round education (as opposed to exam-oriented education 應試教育|应试教育[y
sentence: 学校推行素质教育，重视学生的全面发展。
pinyin: Xuéxiào tuīxíng sùzhì jiàoyù, zhòngshì xuésheng de quánmiàn fāzhǎn.
english: The school promotes all-round education and values students' overall development.

sentence: 书的总目列在第一页，方便读者查阅。
pinyin: Shū de zǒngmù liè zài dì yī yè, fāngbiàn dúzhě cháyuè.
english: The table of contents is on the first page for easy reference.

sentence: 记者们在编辑室里赶稿子到深夜。
pinyin: Jìzhěmen zài biānjíshì lǐ gǎn gǎozi dào shēnyè.
english: The reporters worked in the newsroom until late at night to meet their deadlines.

sentence: 有情况要及时向公安机关报告。
pinyin: Yǒu qíngkuàng yào jíshí xiàng gōng'ān jīguān bàogào.
english: Any suspicious situation should be reported to the public security bureau promptly.

sentence: 用尺量好这块布的四边，再裁剪。
pinyin: Yòng chǐ liáng hǎo zhè kuài bù de sìbiān, zài cáijiǎn.
english: Measure all four sides of this piece of cloth with a ruler before cutting.

meaning: to disseminate knowledge of the law
sentence: 社区举办了一场普法讲座，居民都来听。
pinyin: Shèqū jǔbàn le yī chǎng pǔfǎ jiǎngzuò, jūmín dōu lái tīng.
english: The community held a legal awareness lecture that all residents came to attend.

sentence: 老师让我们背水的化学式H₂O。
pinyin: Lǎoshī ràng wǒmen bèi shuǐ de huàxuéshì H₂O.
english: The teacher asked us to memorize the chemical formula for water: H₂O.

sentence: 她在金钟站下车，走去附近的咖啡厅。
pinyin: Tā zài Jīnzhōng zhàn xià chē, zǒu qù fùjìn de kāfēitīng.
english: She got off at Admiralty station and walked to a nearby café.

sentence: 法院行使司法权，独立审理案件。
pinyin: Fǎyuàn xíngshǐ sīfǎquán, dúlì shěnlǐ ànjiàn.
english: The court exercises judicial authority and hears cases independently.

sentence: 她穿着打扮很朴素，但看起来很有气质。
pinyin: Tā chuān zhe dǎ bàn hěn pǔ sù, dàn kàn qǐ lái hěn yǒu qì zhì.
english: Her style of dress is very plain, but she carries herself with a lot of elegance.

sentence: 爷爷还保留着一些老胶片照片。
pinyin: Yé ye hái bǎo liú zhe yī xiē lǎo jiāo piàn zhào piàn.
english: Grandpa still keeps some old film photographs.

sentence: 山里的空气洁净，让人心情很好。
pinyin: Shān lǐ de kōng qì jié jìng, ràng rén xīn qíng hěn hǎo.
english: The air in the mountains is clean and fresh, which lifts your spirits.

sentence: 广场中间有一个漂亮的音乐喷泉。
pinyin: Guǎngchǎng zhōngjiān yǒu yí gè piàoliang de yīnyuè pēnquán.
english: There's a beautiful musical fountain in the middle of the plaza.

sentence: 这条小路没有路灯，晚上走很不安全。
pinyin: Zhè tiáo xiǎo lù méi yǒu lù dēng, wǎn shàng zǒu hěn bù ān quán.
english: This alley has no street lights, so it's not safe to walk at night.

sentence: 站在这里看得见整个城市的夜景。
pinyin: Zhàn zài zhèlǐ kàn de jiàn zhěnggè chéngshì de yèjǐng.
english: Standing here you can see the night view of the whole city.

meaning: 1. to be situated; 2. to be located (of a building)
sentence: 那家咖啡馆坐落在公园旁边。
pinyin: Nà jiā kā fēi guǎn zuò luò zài gōng yuán páng biān.
english: That café is situated right next to the park.

meaning: 1. to fold; 2. collapsible; 3. folding (bicycle, antenna, bed etc)
sentence: 这把椅子可以折叠，放在车里很方便。
pinyin: Zhè bǎ yǐzi kěyǐ zhédié, fàng zài chē lǐ hěn fāngbiàn.
english: This chair can be folded up, which is very convenient to put in the car.

sentence: 最近天气逐渐趋于稳定。
pinyin: Zuì jìn tiān qì zhú jiàn qū yú wěn dìng.
english: The weather has been gradually tending toward stability lately.

meaning: 1. drop in elevation; 2. (fig.) gap (in wages, expectations etc); 3. d
sentence: 理想和现实之间有很大的落差。
pinyin: Lǐxiǎng hé xiànshí zhījiān yǒu hěn dà de luòchà.
english: There is a huge gap between expectations and reality.
